Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1094 0 0}Ohhh! That makes so much more sense now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}Oops, sorry. Sometimes I think out loud when I read. Um... What're you reading, Aigis? What's it about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1071 0 0}Oh, so like... So you can learn how your body works or something? That's cool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1071 0 0}"Physio"... Uh, the "psychology" part means it has to do with the mind and mental health and stuff, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}I didn't know you were into that kinda thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Really? I never would've thought you'd be into that, given the other kinds of stuff you read.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}This dorm sure has all kinds of books, huh? Everything from casual manga to super complicated stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}When we picked up this book in the Abyss of Time... It reminded me of this place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}And of how I never really read any of the books here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}So I kinda thought... Maybe now's a good time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You gotta make time to take breaks once in a while, right? Like when we watched that show together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}A lot of the others used to read here, right? Fuuka, Mitsuru-senpai... Him, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}It was kinda relaxing even just watching them from a distance. But I could never bring myself to just walk up and ask to join them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}But yeah... When they took breaks, they were definitely getting something out of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}So, I guess I'm trying to follow their example or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}That probably sounds kinda dumb, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}Haha, you sounded so serious just now. But I guess that's not exactly out of character for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I wasn't really expecting someone to just come right out and say it, haha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 52 -1 0 0}So, anyway... Yeah, let's just take it easy for a little while longer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari-san's voice sounds[n]calm, yet empowered...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}But that means we're gonna have to work twice as hard later to make up for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Yeah. We'll have more time to relax after we get out of here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Come on, get with the program! We'll have plenty of time to relax after we get out of here.[n]{f 1 1}
